ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the employee (e.g., Fire Engineer) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the organization */,
  "emergency_contact_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary emergency contact in the contacts table */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's direct supervisor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., active, on leave, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_emergency_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("emergency_contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., Fire, Library) */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated to the department */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the department was established */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the department's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Firefighter, Mechanic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department associated with the role */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the role's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee this contact belongs to */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact (e.g., emergency, personal) */,
  "contact_value" TEXT /* Contact information value (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  "primary" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if this is the primary contact */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the employee (e.g., spouse, parent) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the contact information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_roles" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role mapping */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee assigned to the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started in the role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee ended the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the role assignment was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_roles_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the salary */,
  "amount" REAL /* Salary amount for the employee */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of payment (e.g., monthly, biweekly) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the salary became effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the salary ended (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the salary record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the salary record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose history is being recorded */,
  "old_title" TEXT /* Previous title of the employee */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the title change occurred */,
  "new_title" TEXT /* Title the employee was promoted to */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the title change */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the history record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given in the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who conducted the review */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., annual, mid-year) */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the review record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the review record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_records" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who completed the training */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the training was completed */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who conducted the training */,
  "training_cost" REAL /* Cost of the training program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the training record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the training record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_records_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logins" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee logging in */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time of login */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time of logout */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the login occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for login (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the login record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the login record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logins_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
